titleStmt.title: SII 19.179: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 179. (A.R. No. 688 of 1904.) TIRUPPĀṞKAḌAḶ, WALAJAPET TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, KHARAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a decision of the Mahā-sabhā of Kāvidippākkam alias Avaninārayaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam comprising the following committees viz. kuḍumbu-vāriyaperumakkaḷ (ward supervision), ēri-vāriyam (tank supervision), tōṭṭa-vāriyam (garden supervision), kaḻaṉi-vāriyam (field supervision), the Two-hundred big men, the Bhaṭṭas and the Viśishṭhas. A gift of 30 kaḻañju of gold received by them from a native of Araiśūr in Pāmbuṇi-kūṟṟam a subdivision of Śōṇāḍu for repairing the breaches in the big tank of the village, was to be utilised as an endowment for the maintenance of a daily offering to the god, with 2 nāḻi of rice with the interest accuring on the amount. This duty was entrusted to the ēri-vāriyam that would be elected for each year. The mode of election to the sabhā and the committees is given in detail in the Uttaramallūr inscription of Parāntaka I (M.E.R. for 1899, paras. 59-73).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī .. koparakesariparmmaṟkku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu paṭuvūrkkoṭṭattu kāvitip pākkamākiya Avani nārāyaṇa
ccaturvvetimaṅkalattu Ivvāṭṭai kuṭumpuvāriyap perumakkaḷum Erivāriyap perumakka
ḷum kaḻanivāriyapperumakkaḷum Irunūṟṟuvapperumakkaḷum paṭṭarkaḷum viśiṣṭarkaḷum Uḷḷiṭṭa māsabhaiyom Emmur tirukkarapurat
tumāhādevarkku cantrātittar Uḷḷataṉaikkālamum nicati Irunāḻi paḻavariciyāl Oru tiruamutu ceyvippomā
ka coṇāṭṭu pāmpuṇik kūṟṟattu Araicūril Araicūr U[�]
Emmurp periyaeri Ūrmele Uṭaiñca Uṭaippaṭaippitaṟku mutalāca muppatiṉ kaḻaiñcu poṉ koṇṭom Imuppati
ṉkaḻaiñcu poṉnālum vaṉta pṛddhiyināle cantirāttar Uḷḷaḷavum Emmuril Avvav Āṇṭu Erivāriyañ ceyum Erivāriyap perumakka
ḷ tiruvamutu ceyvippārākap paṇittom Iddharmmam rakṣippār keṅkaiyiṭai kumariyiṭai ceytār ceyta puṇyattaip peṟuvārākavum Itiṉukku Ahita
m veṇṭuvār keṅkaiyiṭai kumariyiṭai ceytār ceyta pāvattiṉaik koḷvārākap paṇittom māhāsaphaiyom Itu kuṟiuḷḷiruntu I
mmāhāsabhaiyār paṇikka Eḻutiṉeṉ maddhyasthaṉ maṅkalaseṉāpati Aṇṇāmalaiyeṉ .. Itu kuṟiuḷḷiruntu paṇikeṭṭu Eḻutiṉeṉ ma
ddhyasthaṉ Eṭṭikkula śrīkavai maṅkalattecaṉeṉ ..itu kuṟiyuḷḷiruntu paṇikeṭṭu Eḻuti ṉeṉ maddhyasthaṉ maṅkalaseṉa
Digital edition of SII 19.179 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
